summary: Created canonical BLOCK_INDEX.yaml with all 27 blocks documented (17 external, 10 internal). Defined 6 recipes (external_standard, external_sales, external_investor, internal_standup, internal_strategy, internal_retrospective), 3 trigger patterns for B00/B07/B14, and priority relevance mappings for all 5 priority domains. Output is human-readable YAML format ready for D0.4 Smart Selector.

recipes.name: external_standard
recipes.description: Default for external meetings - balanced coverage

recipes.name: external_sales
recipes.description: Sales and partnership meetings - focus on commitments and actions

recipes.name: external_investor
recipes.description: Investor meetings - strategic focus with minimal fluff

notes_for_orchestrator: BLOCK_INDEX.yaml is complete and ready for D0.4 (Smart Selector). All 27 blocks are documented with metadata. Recipes provide practical defaults for 6 meeting scenarios. Trigger patterns are defined for B07 (warm intros) and B14 (blurbs). Priority relevance is mapped across all 5 of V's priority domains. File is in human-readable YAML format.
next_steps: D0.4 - Smart Selector can now use BLOCK_INDEX.yaml for block selection logic
